post.subject: Damn Network!
post.body: The main computer in the house hasnt been working great lately. So today i tried to setup the mum's new laptop with net connection and get my internet though the laptop. I tried a million times, fidling with Norton Firewall, the Home Network Connection Setup etc, but to no avail! So about 10mins ago i gave up and stuck the network connections back into the main computer, which is working, but not very well.
